case_number: criminal revision application is dismissed in non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision No. S – 62 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 07.05.2024 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing. Therefore, this criminal revision application is dismissed in non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI
